summary: Elon Musk unfollowed prominent Tesla investor Sawyer Merritt on X, formerly Twitter, due to his alleged dissemination of confidential information about Tesla.

headline: Amazon's Andy Jassy Remains Bullish On AWS, Sees 'Very Large Opportunity' And Expects 'Meaningful' CapEx Increase In 2024
summary: During Amazon's first-quarter 2024 earnings call, CEO Andy Jassy expressed strong optimism about the future of Amazon Web Services (AWS), noting its competitive advantage and significant growth potential as over 85% of global IT spending remains on-premises.
